blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
